final_public_claim: I made a free audit sheet of commercial-use game asset sources. It includes 42 direct asset pages with license signals, plus license/reference and discovery sources.
publish_notes: The sheet clearly separates asset pages from reference/discovery rows.
Public claims are appropriately cautious and avoid legal certainty.
Reddit post draft is well-written and sets proper expectations.
Consider adding a note that some rows rely on creator-wide policy rather than page-level evidence.
For v0.2, replace reference/discovery rows with additional verified asset pages.
